news.t: BlackRock Expands Megatrends Platform with the Launch of the Future Financial and Technology ETF

holdings.infoBox: BPAY is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Klarna Group stock at 4.54%, Robinhood Markets at 4.29%, Capital One Financial at 4.16%, eToro Group at 4.10%, and Global Payments at 3.87%.

overview.description: The iShares FinTech Active ETF (BPAY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of global companies involved in innovative technologies used and applied in financial services. BPAY was launched on Aug 16, 2022 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Expands Megatrends Platform with the Launch of the Future Financial and Technology ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BlackRock has expanded its Megatrends platform with the launch of the BlackRock Future Financial and Technology ETF (NYSE Arca: BPAY). The Fund is actively managed by BlackR...
